address: 606, 1 Griffiths Close, Balsall Heath, Birmingham B12 9BB
lead_profile_text: 1-bed top-floor apartment with city centre views, concierge service, and designated parking space. Fully furnished, recently snagged. Currently remortgaging from residential to BTL (starts September, completes October 2026). Current mortgage £845/month; expected £500–600 after refinance. Total current costs ~£1,200/month.
emotional_profile: Highly motivated — already in the remortgage process, indicating committed intent to maximise income. Standard first-time STL objections (income consistency, costs, guest type) but not deep blockers. Decision gated by mortgage/lease progress, not model uncertainty. Follow-up from entry 044.
delay_trigger_phrases: Confirm short-let permissions in lease agreement
Discuss early start option with HSBC before October remortgage
remortgaging from residential to BTL — completes October 2026
delay_timeline: October 2026 (remortgage completion); earlier start possible if HSBC approves
green_light_trigger_phrases: top floor apartment with city center views, fully furnished
concierge service and designated parking space

top_objections.text: Income consistency — wants assurance income is reliable month to month
top_objections.zac_response: Competitor benchmark at 4.6/5 with 65 reviews within 1km radius; three-platform management; monthly net range £470 (Jan/Feb) to £979 (Sep–Dec).

top_objections.text: Want to understand the costs more — what is actually deducted from gross revenue
top_objections.zac_response: Management fee 13%+VAT, cleaning fee passed through. Transparent monthly statement 1st–5th.

top_objections.text: Wrong type of guests — worried about who books a city-centre short-let property
top_objections.zac_response: Concierge building and designated parking are genuine guest-quality filters; ID verification + booking history screening applied to all bookings.

top_questions.text: How much management involvement is there from my side?
top_questions.answer: Single Slack channel for all communications; central booking calendar with blocking; monthly statements 1st–5th. Stayful handles everything else.

top_questions.text: Can I start before October when the remortgage completes?
top_questions.answer: Discuss early start option with HSBC — if approved, July/August onboarding would capture shoulder season and build reviews before the September university intake.

what_moved_them: Competition analysis: competitor benchmark at 4.6/5 with 65 reviews within 1km radius
Central booking calendar with blocking capability
Concierge service and designated parking as booking differentiators

conversion_gaps.gap: Cannot start until October due to remortgage timeline — misses peak summer season
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Discuss HSBC early start approval; emphasise July/August capture opportunity for reviews before September university intake peak.

conversion_gaps.gap: Short-let permissions in lease not yet confirmed — potential compliance blocker
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Encourage Harnaik to check lease immediately. If permission denied, this becomes a hard blocker.

offer_framing: 13%+VAT (from 15%), expires 22 June 2026. Concierge building as premium USP reducing guest-quality risk. Early start angle to capture shoulder season before October remortgage.
zac_close_phrase: 13% offer expires 22 June — sign now to lock in the rate even before the October go-live date
zac_income_intro: Estimated nightly rate £153 at 65% occupancy. Annual gross £18,875; annual net Y2 £9,785. Year 1 conservative (80% ramp): £7,828. Long-let comparison: £6,875/year — STL uplift +£2,910/year.
zac_transition_phrases: Concierge building and designated parking are booking differentiators that reduce wrong-guest risk
zac_reassurance_phrases: Concierge building genuinely reduces wrong-guest risk and justifies higher rates
30% direct bookings component means lower-risk guest profile over time
rent_mortgage: £845/month current (residential); £500–600/month expected post-BTL remortgage. Total costs ~£1,200/month.
